heading: Erection of replica of Graff House; maintenance
label: 407m–4 Erection of replica of Graff House; maintenance
text: The Secretary is further authorized to erect on the site aforesaid, with donated funds, a replica of the Graff House and to furnish and maintain the same.
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as a part of , , as amended, which comprises this subchapter.act June 28, 1948, ch. 68762 Stat. 1061
